reasoning: Both models failed to audit the PKGBUILD file due to incorrect binary file detection, leaving the entire package unaudited. Since PKGBUILD defines build/install behavior and may reference other scripts, this creates a critical coverage gap preventing safety assessment.
coverage_issues: PKGBUILD was skipped by both models due to erroneous binary file classification
No .install scripts or referenced source files were audited due to initial PKGBUILD skip
false_negatives: Potential risks in PKGBUILD functions (build(), package(), etc.) were completely missed
Possible .install script hooks or unsafe commands in source retrieval were not examined
learnings: Implement fallback text decoding for critical files like PKGBUILD when binary detection fails
Prioritize mandatory review of PKGBUILD before proceeding with other files
Add warning when critical files are skipped due to encoding issues
Improve binary detection heuristics to avoid false positives on shell scripts
